signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rate rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rate rose to 2.2% in March 2026, up from 2.0% in prior months but below 2.4% market forecasts | NO | HIGH confidence** [1][2][4]

This figure, sourced from Statistics Korea and reported by Trading Economics, marks the latest confirmed data as of early April 2026, with the Bank of Korea citing it alongside won volatility to justify its 7th consecutive rate freeze at 2
